title: B. V. Bowden, Baron Bowden
body: Bertram Vivian Bowden, Baron Bowden (; 18 January 1910 – 28 July 1989) was an English scientist and educationist, particularly associated with the development of UMIST as a successful university.
categories: Academics of the University of Manchester Institute of Science and Technology
